§6Desh Servo Set§f is a component for §bautomated machinery§f and robotics.

§eUses:§f
• Required for automated machine components
• Essential for transport drones and conveyors
• Used in assembly machine recipes

§eCrafting:§f
• Made from §bDesh§f and electrical components
• Requires mid-tier manufacturing

§aTip:§f Keep a stock of servo sets for automation projects.
